targets.query:
from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_duration")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_reqs" and r._field == "value")
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_failed" and r._field == "value" and r._value == 1)
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "failed")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "avg")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (columns, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95))
  |> yield(name: "p95")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_reqs" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> yield(name: "throughput")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "data_received" or r._measurement == "data_sent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum)
  |> yield(name: "data")
